display_name: MiniMax Speech 2.8 is a premium text-to-speech model delivering studio-quality audio with enhanced clarity and naturalness. With support for multiple voice presets, emotional tones, and fine-grained a
description: MiniMax Speech 2.8 is a premium text-to-speech model delivering studio-quality audio with enhanced clarity and naturalness. With support for multiple voice presets, emotional tones, and fine-grained audio controls, it produces broadcast-ready speech synthesis for professional applications.
